message:
fix(tests): Update tests for Widget::render Frame signature

Tests in ftui-harness and ftui-render were using the old Buffer-based
Widget::render signature. Updated to use Frame pattern:
- Create GraphemePool
- Create Frame from pool
- Call widget.render(area, &mut frame)
- Access buffer via frame.buffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
